title: Entity Sonic Boom Behavior
description: Allows this entity to perform a 'sonic boom' ranged attack

attack_cooldown.title: Attack Cooldown
attack_cooldown.description:
Cooldown in seconds required after using this attack until the entity can use sonic boom again.

Sample values:
• warden: 2

attack_damage.title: Attack Damage
attack_damage.description:
Attack damage of the sonic boom.

Sample values:
• warden: 10

attack_range_horizontal.title: Attack Range Horizontal
attack_range_horizontal.description: Horizontal range (in blocks) at which the sonic boom can damage the target.

attack_range_vertical.title: Attack Range Vertical
attack_range_vertical.description: Vertical range (in blocks) at which the sonic boom can damage the target.

attack_sound.title: Attack Sound
attack_sound.description:
Sound event for the attack.

Sample values:
• warden: sonic_boom

charge_sound.title: Charge Sound
charge_sound.description:
Sound event for the charge up.

Sample values:
• warden: sonic_charge

duration.title: Duration
duration.description:
Goal duration in seconds

Sample values:
• warden: 3

duration_until_attack_sound.title: Duration Until Attack Sound
duration_until_attack_sound.description: Duration in seconds until the attack sound is played.

knockback_height_cap.title: Knockback Height Cap
knockback_height_cap.description:
Height cap of the attack knockback's vertical delta.

Sample values:
• warden: 0.5

knockback_horizontal_strength.title: Knockback Horizontal Strength
knockback_horizontal_strength.description:
Horizontal strength of the attack's knockback applied to the attack target.

Sample values:
• warden: 2.5

knockback_vertical_strength.title: Knockback Vertical Strength
knockback_vertical_strength.description:
Vertical strength of the attack's knockback applied to the attack target.

Sample values:
• warden: 0.5

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• warden: 3

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
This multiplier modifies the attacking entity's speed when moving toward the target.

Sample values:
• warden: 1.2
